/usr/bin/ar qc liblualib5.a CMakeFiles/lualib5.dir/lib/lauxlib.c.o CMakeFiles/lualib5.dir/lib/lbaselib.c.o CMakeFiles/lualib5.dir/lib/ldblib.c.o CMakeFiles/lualib5.dir/lib/liolib.c.o CMakeFiles/lualib5.dir/lib/lmathlib.c.o CMakeFiles/lualib5.dir/lib/loadlib.c.o CMakeFiles/lualib5.dir/lib/lstrlib.c.o CMakeFiles/lualib5.dir/lib/ltablib.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liblualib5.a
